benefits.title: Programmes can claim their graduate futures value with confidence
benefits.statement: Programme teams have credible evidence and language for articulating distinctive programme value to students, applicants and colleagues.
benefits.beneficiary: Programme teams, departments, faculties, students, applicants, recruitment teams and King's Edge
benefits.successLooksLike: Each participating programme has a programme-confirmed graduate futures story that is evidence-linked, appropriately caveated and suitable for at least one agreed review, recruitment or student-facing use.

enabledBy.outputTitle: First working graduate futures evidence pack

benefits.title: Programmes and faculties can act on graduate futures insight
benefits.statement: Programme teams and faculties can translate graduate futures evidence into focused questions, support needs and locally owned action.
benefits.beneficiary: Programme teams, departments, faculties, Careers and Employability Service, King's Edge and students
benefits.successLooksLike: Guided conversations or self-review produce proportionate, agreed insights that enter normal programme or faculty planning and inform King's-level synthesis, while allowing a legitimate conclusion that no additional action is needed.

enabledBy.outputTitle: Practical local actions and faculty learning
